title: MISP Galaxy Definition Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating MISP-compatible galaxy definition files.

icon.description: Font Awesome icon name for display.

type.description: Type identifier matching the cluster file.

uuid.description: UUID v4 identifier for the galaxy.

version.description: Version number of the galaxy definition.

kill_chain_order.description: Optional kill chain ordering. Keys are kill chain names, values are arrays of phase names.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the galaxy. 'populated' means the paired cluster has curated values. 'scaffold' means the galaxy namespace and uuid are intentionally registered with an empty cluster pending first-party population. 'draft' means the schema is still changing. 'deprecated' means consumers should migrate off.
